whats_new:
• Added Undo/Redo support in the code editor for a better coding experience.
• New button added in the Library section to quickly locate files in your File Manager.
• Fixed a critical crash issue when opening .ino files.
• Implemented a Code Sanitizer to prevent hidden Unicode characters from causing compilation errors.
• Removed non-AVR library compilation to ensure compatibility and faster builds.
• Minor bug fixes and performance improvements.
